title: Investigation: Repeat near-miss at Warehouse B loading dock
description: Structured review of three similar near-miss reports involving pedestrian and FLT interaction.
findings: Reversing alarms not consistently audible in ambient noise.
Pedestrian walkways not always marked during peak shifts.
Supervisor handovers omitted FLT traffic plans on two occasions.
recommendations: Mandate daily FLT pre-use alarm check with sign-off.
Refresh floor marking in Bay 7–9 and add temporary barriers during peaks.
Add FLT/pedestrian coordination item to shift handover template.
